api_key.description: Finage API key. Sent only as the apikey query parameter; never logged.

base_url.description: Finage API base URL override for tests or proxies.

symbols.description: Comma- or whitespace-separated stock ticker symbols to fan out over for the market_news stream (one GET /news/market/{symbol} request per symbol). Required for that stream only; the other 4 streams do not reference it.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
